data.title: NOVATAE RISK GROUP NAMES J. CLAY KADLIC NEW VP STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIPS
data.description: On April 27, 2026, Novatae Risk Group, the wholesale insurance division of World Insurance Associates, welcomed J. Clay Kadlic as its new vice president of strategic partnerships. Kadlic's appointment aims to drive growth and collaboration within the company.
Global Ship Lease Announces Annual Meeting of Shareholders

data.title: Forbes Names All Nine Cassaday & Company Partners to 2026 Best-In-State Wealth Advisors List for Virginia
data.description: A wealth management firm in McLean, Virginia, Cassaday & Company, Inc., proudly shares that all nine of its partners have been recognized on the 2026 Forbes Best-In-State Wealth Advisors list for Virginia. These partners have an average of 24 years of experience at the firm.

data.title: Pentagon allowed to mandate escorts for journalists in building while contesting ruling against press restrictions.
data.description: A panel of judges has decided that the Defense Department has the authority to mandate escorts for journalists within the premises. This decision comes as the department is contesting a previous ruling that deemed a significant portion of its press limitations as unconstitutional. The ruling allows the department to maintain control over reporter access within the building.

data.title: Feldspar unveils world's first surface-based force measurement platform, announces engineering partnership and opens capital raise
data.description: A newly developed technology, created in collaboration with Cambridge Design Partnership (CDP), utilizes a unique triangular force plate design to gather immediate ground force information from the sports surface on a large scale. The innovative technology, currently pending a patent, was announced in London on April 27, 2026 by sports technology company Feldspar Group.

data.title: Rubicon Organics to Report Q1 2026 Results; Announces Line of Credit Amendment
data.description: Rubicon Organics Inc., a prominent premium cannabis producer in Canada, will release its financial results for Q1 2026 on May 13, 2026, after the market closes. The company recently secured an Amendment to raise its line of credit with Community Savings Credit Union from $1.0 million to $2.5 million. Rubicon Organics' stock is listed as TSXV: ROMJ and OTCQX: ROMJF.

data.title: BLADEX ANNOUNCES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND PAYMENT FOR FIRST QUARTER 2026
data.description: In Panama City on April 27, 2026, a financial institution declared a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.6875 per share for the first quarter of 2026, approved by its Board of Directors. The dividend will be paid on May 27, 2026, to shareholders holding the Bank's stock as of the May 8, 2026 record date.

data.title: Bladex announces Net Profit of $56.4 Million for the First Quarter 2026
data.description: Panama City witnessed a significant announcement on April 27, 2026, when Bladex, a multinational bank established by 23 central banks from Latin America and the Caribbean, disclosed its latest updates. Operating under the NYSE ticker BLX, the bank primarily focuses on enhancing foreign trade and economic integration within the region. This development marks a crucial step in the bank's mission to support regional economies and promote international cooperation.

data.title: ORVANA REPORTS Q2 FY2026 EXPLORATION RESULTS IN SPAIN
data.description: Orvana Minerals Corp. provided exploration updates in Spain for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026, ending March 31, 2026. The company, listed on TSX as ORV and OTCQX as ORVMF, reported positive progress in its exploration efforts during this period. The updates were shared on April 27, 2026, showcasing advancements in their exploration activities.

data.title: Polaris Inc. First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Available on Company's Website
data.description: In Minneapolis on April 28, 2026, Polaris Inc. (NYSE: PII) disclosed its financial outcomes for the first quarter of the year. The report was made available through an earnings announcement on the firm's Investor Relations portal at ir.polaris.com. This disclosure will also be provided to the Securities and Exchange Commission.
InsCorp, Inc. Reports Results for 1Q26

data.title: FreshRealm, Inc. Reaches Agreement with Key Customer and Initiates Chapter 11 Process to Support Ongoing Operations and Evaluate Strategic Alternatives
data.description: On April 27, 2026, in Linden, New Jersey, FreshRealm, a platform specializing in fresh foods, made public its voluntary decision to seek protection under Chapter 11 of the U.S. Bankruptcy Code in the United States Bankruptcy Court for the District of New Jersey. This filing comes in response to notable challenges faced by the company.

data.title: NOV Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings
data.description: Non-GAAP metrics including Free Cash Flow, Excess Free Cash Flow, Adjusted Operating Profit, and Adjusted EBITDA are detailed in the sections titled "Non-GAAP Financial Measures" and "Reconciliation of GAAP to non-GAAP measures" provided below.

data.title: Biomea Fusion Announces Positive 52-Week Results from Phase 2 COVALENT-112 Trial in Type 1 Diabetes Showing C-Peptide Improvement and Durability Following 12-Weeks of Icovamenib Treatment
data.description: San Carlos, California - On April 27, 2026, Biomea Fusion, Inc. disclosed favorable outcomes from its Phase 2 COVALENT-112 trial assessing the performance of icovamenib, a clinical-stage diabetes and obesity treatment, in patients diagnosed with type 1 diabetes ("T1D"). The study, a proof-of-concept investigation, focused on small groups of Stage 3 T1D patients who were administered icovamenib at doses of 100 mg and 200 mg across two cohorts: those diagnosed within 3 years and those diagnosed within 3-15 years. The results demonstrated promising results over a 52-week period in terms of efficacy, safety, and tolerability. Biomea Fusion, trading on Nasdaq under the symbol BMEA, shared this development.

data.title: Airlines request $2.5 billion from Trump admin due to surging jet fuel costs post U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran.
data.description: An airline trade organization is requesting $2.5 billion to mitigate the significant increase in jet fuel expenses following the commencement of U.S.-Israeli military actions targeting Iran.

data.title: Performance Shipping Inc. Announces Filing of 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: On April 27, 2026, Performance Shipping Inc. (NASDAQ: PSHG), a global tanker vessel ownership company, disclosed the submission of its 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F for the year concluding on December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Interested parties can view the audited consolidated financial statements within the Annual Report on the SEC's site or the company's official webpage. Shareholders may also request a physical copy of the Annual Report at no cost.

data.title: Blue Revolution Games™ Launches "Otter Planet," A Science-Aligned, Heart-Centered Gaming Experience Designed to Improve Youth Well-Being and Inspire Global Water Stewardship
data.description: A milestone has been achieved as 500,000 Otter Guardians have been enlisted within just 50 days in Bucks County, Pa. An innovative approach has surfaced that combines immersive storytelling, environmental science, and emotional bonding to promote not only human well-being but also planetary health. This initiative by Blue Revolution Games™ (BRG) highlights a unique style of engaging with  a growing number of participants.

data.title: Turning Point Brands to Host Q1 2026 Conference Call
data.description: Turning Point Brands, Inc. (NYSE: TPB) has scheduled a conference call to discuss their first quarter 2026 results. The call is set to take place on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Analysts and investors interested in participating can do so by registering and using the following call-in numbers: (800) 715-9871 for U.S. callers (toll-free) and (646) 307-1963 for international participants. The Event ID for this call is 4128483. It is recommended that participants dial in at least ten minutes prior to the start of the call.

data.title: Mineros S.A. Partners With IIT Kharagpur’s Vikram Sodhi Center for AI-Enabled Mining
data.description: In Medellín, Colombia, Mineros S.A. (TSX: MSA | OTCQX: MNSAF | BVC: MINEROS) revealed its partnership with the Vikram Sodhi Center of Excellence for Enabling Artificial Intelligence in Geological and Mining Systems, affiliated with the Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Kharagpur. This collaboration advances Mineros in AI-driven mining initiatives, emphasizing operational efficiency and safety. The move solidifies the company's commitment to long-term growth and innovation in the sector.
